name: Amaranth Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Soy, rice, or nut milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, mix together the amaranth cereal, whole wheat pastry flour, egg replacer, and baking powder.
2. Pour in the soy, rice, or nut milk and stir with a spoon until all ingredients are well combined. If the batter is too thick, add a little more milk.
3. Drop 1/4 cup of batter into a hot, oiled skillet. Cook over medium-high heat until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes.
4. Flip the pancakes and cook until both sides are golden brown.
